channel.title: Discover South Lake Union Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Discover South Lake Union Events

item.title: Easter Cruises
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Waterways Cruises & Events, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Waterways is offering two cruise options to help you celebrate Easter in style!

Event details

item.title: Trivia Nights at King Leroy
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: King Leroy, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Gather your crew. Flex those brain muscles. Let the games begin!

Event details

item.title: Q2 Flow Fitness Class & Tabling
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

For this quarter’s class, Flow Fitness will send out a personal trainer to teach a core strength-focused class.

Event details

item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Event details

item.title: Out & Back with Désir: Screening & Q+A
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: REI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Alison Mariella Désir, host of Out & Back on Cascade PBS, and Max Djenohan, elite survivalist and athlete, for a screening and Q + A.

Event details

item.title: Canto Ostinato
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: 415 on Westlake, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Glazer's Photography Essentials Part 1
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

In our Photography Essentials Part 1 course, you will learn about the fundamentals of your camera and its capabilities.

item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA
